description.value:
Beginning at 1st level, there is something fundamentally different about the anger you manifest into power.

You are unable to ever gain immunity to the Berserk condition in any way. Additionally, any ranks of Berserk you gain are permanently changed to the following:

Berserk (Legendary)

Max Ranks: 5 + Half your Proficiency Bonus
Unlike other Berserk creatures, your anger is full of untapped potential and strength, not only do you act akin to a rapid animal but you also seemingly become stronger when you do so.

  • A Berserk creature must use all action(s) and movement to attack/harm the creature nearest to it that it can perceive as if that creature was a mortal enemy. If multiple creatures are potential targets, it picks the target that most recently harmed them, if no creatures involved have harmed them they will pick one at random.
  • When a creature moves out of a Berserk creature's reach, it provokes an opportunity attack. This does not spend a reaction.
  • A Berserk creature has a -1 penalty to all Charisma based attacks, checks, and saving throws for each rank it has.
  • A Berserk creature does not lose any ranks of this condition unless they do so through a feature in this clan, a Jutsu, or they spend at least 5 minutes Berserking.
